content.en:
The years passed.

The gap between the territorial waters has gradually stabilized, and the top hegemon-level forces occupy a piece of territory, and many forces under their command have surrendered.

It can be said that it is very calm on the surface.

Wanlong territorial waters.

Ye Tian ended his cultivation for a while.

"The cultivation of the Bone Transformation Realm is really difficult!"

He also used a lot of resources suitable for refining immeasurable bones in the bone transformation realm, but he had already completed a bone transformation himself, and it was very difficult to continue refining on the basis of a bone transformation.

Even if there are a lot of resources, don't think about refining to the extreme of the first bone transformation realm in a short period of time, let alone impact the second bone transformation realm.

Like many bone transformation realms, it took hundreds of thousands or even millions of primeval epochs to cultivate before they were able to break through to the second bone transformation realm!

Therefore, it was almost impossible for him to break through to the Second Bone Transformation Realm in just one or two primeval eras.

Unless he can get a big chance in a short period of time.

this day.

There was a slight oscillation in the territorial sea rift, and then the energy of the entire territorial sea boundary rift was rising.

"This is the boundary of territorial waters!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

Since the part of the Hunhe River boundary crack has been integrated into the territorial sea boundary seam, the entire territorial sea boundary crack has been upgraded, but the process of upgrading is very slow.

Now, the upgrade process is finally complete.

From now on, the person of the territorial sea boundary rift is on the same person as the previous Hunhe boundary rift.

Of course, the area of the Hunhe River boundary rift is very small, far less than the territorial sea boundary rift.

Previously, the Hunhe Boundary Rift was equivalent to an iron ball the size of a fist, and the territorial sea boundary Rift was equivalent to a wooden ball the size of the Earth.

Now, the boundary gap of the territorial sea has also become an iron ball, and the person is directly the same.

......

The territorial sea boundary gap has been upgraded, and the bone transformation realm is very happy, and even the bone transformation realm of the original Hunhe boundary gap is very happy, which means that more and more opportunities will be born in the territorial sea boundary crack in the future.

In this way, they can obtain more resources and elevate their cultivation to a higher realm.

The area of the Hunhe River boundary crack is still not comparable with the territorial sea boundary seam, so after the territorial sea boundary crack is upgraded this time, the total amount of resources in the future is not comparable to the Hunhe River boundary seam.

The next era will also be the era of bone transformation realm carnival.

Subsequently.

The major forces have sent a large number of Blood Transformation Realms to explore various territories, and once a new treasure land or opportunity is born, they will report it as soon as possible.

And Ye Tian also sent a group of Terrans to find an opportunity.

this day.

Somewhere in the boundary of territorial waters, a new treasure was born.

For the first time, a Bone Transformation Realm came to this new treasure land.

The reason why this new treasure land has attracted so many bone transformation realms is naturally that it is quite extraordinary, and the energy fluctuations are too terrifying.

Whoa!!!

A metamorphosis has descended.

Ye Tian also came here.

"The treasure land is still being conceived, and there is no way to enter it now!"

Ye Tian took a look at it and judged it.

Then.

The Lord of the Ruins tried to force his way in, but a white light directly shook the Lord of the Ruins away.

"What a terrifying treasure land, it can actually shock me!"

The Lord of the Ruins sighed.

Since you can't force your way in, you can only wait.

They calculated that if this treasure land was to be conceived, it would probably take an ancient era.

An ancient era is also a long time, so many bone transformation realms left one by one after that, but they all sent blood transformation realms to be stationed here to report the situation at any time.

The years passed.

An primeval era slowly passed.

Finally, on this day, this treasure land was born.

However.

Some creatures from the Eight Blood Transformation Realm tried to break in, but they couldn't even break the barrier of the treasure land, and they couldn't enter at all.

Rumble!

A Bone Transformation Realm casually broke the barrier of the treasure land, broke into the treasure land, and then quickly came out.

"This treasure land is very suppressed, and it is difficult for ordinary bone transformation realms to enter it, at least nine blood transformation realm primeval level geniuses are qualified to break through it, but it is estimated that there is also danger!"

This bone metamorphosis realm revealed.

Subsequently.

A Bone Changeling Realm has broken into this treasure land.

The Masters of the Void are here!

The Ancient Mountain Lord, the Lord of Darkness, and other Bone Transformation Realms also broke into this place, all wanting to benefit from it.

"This time, I can let the other two vests enter this treasure land, and when the time comes, I can find a reason to let these two vests also break through to the bone transformation realm. In this way, there is no problem of coincidence, and at the same time, if you break through to the bone transformation realm, there will be no suspicion of the bone transformation realm. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

As a result, the other two Vest Water Heavenly Ancestors and Long Yan Heavenly Ancestors all came here, and then they all entered this treasure land one after another.

......

"Sure enough, the suppression is very large, even if it is me, the strength I play here is not strong!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Since this place has just been bred, there are no native blood mutant creatures here, but it doesn't mean that there are no creatures here.

Rumble!!!!!

A terrifying giant beast exuding an ancient evil aura appeared, attacking directly towards Ye Tian.

"It's an ancient murderous thing!"

Ye Tian knew that this kind of primeval beast did not have wisdom, and it was said that at the beginning of the birth of every primeval treasure land, some primeval beasts would be born, and the strength was also uneven.

And the grade of this treasure land is too high, so even if it is an ordinary primeval beast, they have to deal with it carefully when their strength is suppressed.

"Ancient God and Demon Fist!"

Ye Tian punched it and directly exploded this primeval beast.

But the primeval creature did not die, and soon healed and recovered.

Ye Tian attacked dozens of times in a row before he obliterated this primeval beast.

"With the strength suppressed, it's really a bit troublesome to kill an ancient murderous thing!" Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he began to search for resources in this treasure land.

"This is the Ancient Hunyuan Flower, a good thing, it will help me refine the Infinite Bone!"

Ye Tian directly picked this primeval source flower and put it away.

In the days that followed, he continued to fight against the primeval murderous creatures and collect various resources.

I have to say that there are a lot of resources here, and the primeval beasts he has encountered so far have not been able to threaten him.

But this day.

Trouble is coming.

......

Deep in the Treasure Land.

The Lord of Gu Peng was looking for resources, and found a gray crystal, and after feeling its aura, he was immediately excited.

"Ancient Source Crystal, there is actually an Ancient Source Crystal here!!"

The Lord of Gu Peng knew that if he collected some Ancient Source Crystals, he would definitely be able to break through to the Three Bone Transformation Realm!

Immediately, he put away this primeval source crystal, preparing to continue searching for the primeval source crystal around here.

He didn't believe that there was an Ancient Source Crystal here.

Thereupon.

He kept attacking this place, shattering and tearing the ground apart, looking for the primeval source crystals hidden deep underground.

However, at this time, a terrifying primeval beast was awakened.

Burst!

A claw pierced through his body at a speed beyond the imagination of the Lord of Gu Peng, directly shattering his body.
